sys_script_client.description:
When Tasking Authority Changes, set and disable OPR if TA is internal. otherwise enable OPR
- STRY0075857 Add External to Template
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - The OU selected is an external Organizational Unit Tasker - Changing the Tasking Authority Updates All Descendant Tasks
sys_script_client.name: Temp Task - onChange Tasking Auth
